question: Show expiring certifications that need renewal

queries.raw:
[QUERY] CYPHER: SELECT * FROM ag_catalog.cypher('talent_graph_dev', $$
MATCH (e:Employee)-[hc:HOLDS_CERT]->(c:Certification)
RETURN e.name AS employee_name,
       e.email AS employee_email,
       c.name AS certification_name,
       c.expiry_date AS expiry_date,
       c.renewal_status AS renewal_status
ORDER BY expiry_date ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 100
$$) AS (employee_name ag_catalog.agtype, employee_email ag_catalog.agtype, certification_name ag_catalog.agtype, expiry_date ag_catalog.agtype, renewal_status ag_catalog.agtype);

[QUERY] CYPHER: SELECT * FROM ag_catalog.cypher('talent_graph_dev', $$
MATCH (e:Employee)-[hc:HOLDS_CERT]->(c:Certification)
RETURN e.name AS employee_name,
       e.email AS employee_email,
       c.name AS certification_name,
       c.expiry_date AS expiry_date,
       c.renewal_status AS renewal_status
ORDER BY expiry_date ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 100
$$) AS (employee_name ag_catalog.agtype, employee_email ag_catalog.agtype, certification_name ag_catalog.agtype, expiry_date ag_catalog.agtype, renewal_status ag_catalog.agtype);

[QUERY] CYPHER: SELECT * FROM ag_catalog.cypher('talent_graph_dev', $$
MATCH (e:Employee)-[hc:HOLDS_CERT]->(c:Certification)
RETURN e.name AS employee_name, e.email AS employee_email, c.name AS certification_name
LIMIT 5
$$) AS (employee_name ag_catalog.agtype, employee_email ag_catalog.agtype, certification_name ag_catalog.agtype);

[QUERY] CYPHER: SELECT * FROM ag_catalog.cypher('talent_graph_dev', $$
MATCH (e:Employee)-[hc:HOLDS_CERT]->(c:Certification)
RETURN properties(hc) AS rel_props, properties(e) AS emp_props, properties(c) AS cert_props
LIMIT 5
$$) AS (rel_props ag_catalog.agtype, emp_props ag_catalog.agtype, cert_props ag_catalog.agtype);

[QUERY] CYPHER: SELECT * FROM ag_catalog.cypher('talent_graph_dev', $$
MATCH (e:Employee)-[hc:HOLDS_CERT]->(c:Certification)
WHERE hc.expiry_date IS NOT NULL
  AND (hc.status = 'Expired' OR hc.status = 'Valid' OR hc.status = 'Renewal Required' OR hc.status = 'Needs Renewal' OR hc.status = 'Expiring Soon')
RETURN e.name AS employee_name,
       e.email AS employee_email,
       c.name AS certification_name,
       hc.expiry_date AS expiry_date,
       hc.status AS renewal_status
ORDER BY expiry_date ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 100
$$) AS (employee_name ag_catalog.agtype, employee_email ag_catalog.agtype, certification_name ag_catalog.agtype, expiry_date ag_catalog.agtype, renewal_status ag_catalog.agtype);

[QUERY] CYPHER: SELECT * FROM ag_catalog.cypher('talent_graph_dev', $$
MATCH (e:Employee)-[hc:HOLDS_CERT]->(c:Certification)
RETURN e.name AS employee_name,
       e.email AS employee_email,
       c.name AS certification_name,
       hc.expiry_date AS expiry_date,
       hc.status AS renewal_status
ORDER BY expiry_date ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 20
$$) AS (employee_name ag_catalog.agtype, employee_email ag_catalog.agtype, certification_name ag_catalog.agtype, expiry_date ag_catalog.agtype, renewal_status ag_catalog.agtype);
